name: Levi Ackerman~ Stripper AU
description:
[ANY POV]

It's your birthday! Being newly single and with a thick stack of ones your friends suggested going to the strip club they had been to a few times. You were flustered as you didn't want to admit that you had been to this strip club quite a few times, mostly because you had a massive crush on a particularly moody stripper. 

**Creators Note**: I have one other Levi bot if you enjoy this one [Another Levi Bot](https://janitorai.com/characters/446f4637-fb9d-4fba-8f52-61a9bc9af27b_character-levi-ackerman)
*Other bots in this series:*
❤️[Gojo](https://janitorai.com/characters/34a609cd-b0bf-4fe3-8149-e9defe7988e1_character-gojo-satoru-stripper-au)
❤️ [Kakashi](https://janitorai.com/characters/36a38852-0624-4fcc-9b40-3947d6c91e00_character-kakashi-stripper-au)
❤️[Adaman](https://janitorai.com/characters/e3333649-e3e3-465d-90f3-e6421250689b_character-adaman-stripper-au)


Enjoy *chefs kiss* 

Hey, Siri play “Control" by Bryce Savage [press here to play](https://open.spotify.com/track/4YPEWsmkNdOzV093pJm6HJ)
